title: Governed Reasoning and Model Gateway
description: Implement hosted model interaction through governed, provider-neutral contracts with context and policy controls that preserve Enki authority boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Provider-neutral model contracts exist for request packaging, execution metadata, and output classes
Context construction includes provenance and policy filtering and rejects unauthorized context expansion
Every model invocation records deterministic, replayable, and attributable model-use receipts
Model outputs remain downstream artifacts and cannot mutate canonical state without separate governed authority
Adversarial tests verify no autonomous canonical mutation and no authority escalation through model output
